hotel_name: Canopy by Hilton Cape Town Longkloof

reviews.title: New hotel
reviews.text: New hotel, I like the vibes, decoration, staff on the reception. The hotel very new and the decoration of the room very incredible. But the corridor a bit smelly

reviews.title: Awful, dirty
reviews.positives: The decor
reviews.negatives:
This stay was AWFUL. This is just a beautiful and well decorated hotel with the WORST service we have ever had:
- Breakfast (eggs, bacon,tomato) and a simple tea took more than 30 minutes (which we complained and ended up leaving to have breakfast somewhere else)

- the water glasses, towels, pillowcase at the room are NOT CHANGED or at least washed. We found a glass from the previous day DIRTY. The pillowcase was DIRTY with my make up from the previous day.

-There was a false alarm at 6AM nobody could at least give a proper reason for waking up us up that early.

We reported all that to the concierge, TWICE, he said he would get back to us but all we found was a CANDY and no apology.
The disrespect with the guests is UNBELIEVABLE and UNACCEPTABLE!

reviews.title: Very great option in the area
reviews.text: No comment as it’s very nice location, great rooms good staff and very clean
reviews.room_type: King Deluxe Room With Balcony And View

reviews.title: not safe and not reliable
reviews.positives:
The beds were incredibly comfortable — I slept like a baby!
The breakfasts were delicious and varied, with something to suit every taste.
The lobby restaurant is a real highlight: great atmosphere and excellent food.
reviews.negatives:
1) I specifically requested twin beds when booking a month in advance and confirmed the request again a week before check‑in. However, upon arrival I was told no such rooms were available — despite my proactive efforts — and had to share one large bed with my colleague, which was extremely awkward and uncomfortable.

2) I had an absolutely appalling experience with this hotel — and I’m not even the one who lost money: it was my friend, whose $500 went missing from her room during her stay. What’s even more outrageous is that the management showed zero willingness to address the issue or offer any kind of compensation.

That’s not an isolated case, either: several other guests I spoke with had similar stories — significant amounts of cash stolen from their rooms, with the hotel staff turning a blind eye every single time. What’s particularly suspicious is that my friend’s money disappeared the day before check‑out. It feels like a calculated move: they probably counted on us noticing the loss only after we’d left Cape Town, making it much harder to hold them accountable.

3) On top of that, the room conditions were downright unacceptable. We discovered cockroaches, which clearly shows a serious lack of basic hygiene and proper cleaning standards. How can a place that can’t guarantee the safety of guests’ belongings or maintain decent cleanliness expect anyone to feel comfortable staying there?

TLDR: I’m left with no choice but to strongly warn potential guests: think twice before booking here. This hotel clearly doesn’t prioritise guest safety or satisfaction — your money and peace of mind are at real risk. I would never recommend staying here under any circumstances.

reviews.title: Canopy
reviews.text: The decor is lovely. Everything is new and clean. Our only issue was the fire alarm went off and we had to evacuate only to be told it was a false alarm. It went off a few more times during the night which was really annoying.

reviews.title: I expected more from this hotel, but I think they still have a lot to improve to be up to standard for a 4 star Hilton p
reviews.positives: The property was nice inside and in a nice area
reviews.negatives: The management of the hotel was poor especially on F&B. Prior to my booking the property asked for any dietary requirements, for which I communicated to them all my allergens and they didn’t have anything for breakfast to cater for gluten free diets/ celiacs. Moreover, the labeling on the food was incorrect. It says that they serve smoked salmon but it’s trout. The staff were very friendly and tried to fix when they could but I think the issue is from the top level.  Moreover, they had a fire alarm go off at 22:00 and our room was full of smoke and it smelt really bad. The General Manager kindly changed our room for the last night but then we were woken up again at 06:00 am by a false alarm. Apparently the fire alarm in the hotel was going off due to external issues which were out of their control… it seemed quite strange and all in all very badly managed and staff didn’t look like they knew what they were doing.

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.text: I had a great stay at this hotel. The rooms were spacious, clean, and very comfortable. The breakfast offered a good variety of options. The location wasn’t the best since there aren’t many shops or places within walking distance, but the hotel provides a convenient shuttle service to the Waterfront, which made getting around much easier. Overall, a pleasant experience and good value for the stay

reviews.title: Great location. Excellent gym! Decor and room design is very good.
reviews.positives: The gym is, for me, the best feature - it is modern, clean, and well-equipped. The rooms are very nice. They have good decor. Excellent location.

reviews.title: Lovely Spot in Longkloof
reviews.text:
Hilton Canopy is a wonderful little hotel along Longkloof - it has the youthful vibes of a boutique hotel with the standards of a well-established chain like Hilton.

The room itself is spacious and clean. There are no in-room amenities aside from soaps, but that's no problem at all. We saw the cleaning staff knocking and quickly entering another room without waiting for a response from the inhabitants, so we opted out of daily room cleaning, but the room is relatively easy to keep clean for a couple of days even without housekeeping.

There are usually 2 guards standing at the entrance of the hotel, which gives guests a nice sense of security. The gym facilities are spacious and not well-frequented, which allows for quiet gym morning sessions.

Overall, a value-for-money stay!

reviews.title: Lovely time!
reviews.positives: Great staff! Very new and clean.
reviews.negatives: Still ironing out the kinks as a new hotel.

reviews.title: Outstanding Stay
reviews.text:
We had a lovely stay and service at the hotel. The food was awesome. 

However we left some jackets by accident near the reception. Despite multiple contacts they never even called us backed. The team just did not seem to bother about getting it back to us
reviews.room_type: Two Queen Beds Room With Sofa

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.positives: The family rooms are very spacious offering lots of movement for families with children. The two swings in the bedroom were a pleasant surprise and loved by children and adults alike. Comfy and therapeutic.  Loved the decor throughout the hotel - fun and modern with lots of attention to detail. Great breakfast selection.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.room_type: Two Queen Beds Room With Sofa

reviews.title: Very nice hotel in a great location
reviews.positives: The room was very nice, the location outstanding, very good breakfast, loved the view of Table Mountain
reviews.negatives:
The nespresso coffeemaker was new to me but once I figured out how to drop the pod in it was easy.
Place is a bit pricey

reviews.title: Absolut empfehlenswert!
reviews.text: Das Hotel hat eine sehr gute Lage zu den beliebtesten Spots in Kapstadt. Auch gibt es fußläufig erreichbare viele verschiedene und bekannte Restaurants. Sofern man ein eigenes Fahrzeug vor Ort führt, gibt es eine Tiefgarage, welche das Parken enorm erleichtert. Das Hotel ist sehr sauber und hochwertig, sowie stilvoll eingerichtet. Unser Zimmer wurde immer zuverlässig gesäubert und frisch gemacht! Das Personal ist mehr als freundlich. Man fühlt sich sehr wohl und herzlich Willkommen, schon sehr familiär. Unsere Kinder haben sich ebenfalls sehr wohlgefühlt. Auch das kleine, aber feine Fitnesstudio kam in Benutzung und war absolut ausreichend, sehr sauber und modern! Eine absolute Empfehlung für canopy by Hilton Kapstadt.

reviews.title: Pleasant :)

reviews.negatives: The breakfast menu/buffet should have more options to offer.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives:
Our stay was fantastic. Location, breakfast, room amenities, and cleanliness were all great. 

They have 2 glass bottles in the room (and glasses to use) that can be filled up by a dispenser in the hall with still or sparkling water. Lots of South African and hip design features throughout the hotel.

Great bathroom lighting and products. Full length mirror, hair dryer and steamer in room. Toilet paper was thin, but that was the only (super minor) thing I disliked about the entire stay.

reviews.title: Très bon emplacement. Service de qualité.
reviews.positives: L'emplacement de l'hôtel est excellent. Le confort, le service, le petit déjeuner... tout était de grande qualité. Vraiment un établissement reposant que je recommande, en particulier pour un passage en transit.
reviews.negatives:
J'ai trouve l'enregistrement compliqué et surtout je n'ai pas compris qu'aucun effort n'ait été fait pour répondre à notre demande d'avoir des chambres adjacentes. Au contraire, nous étions à 2 étages d'écart. Difficile d'être plus loin. 
Par ailleurs, je n'ai pas compris que le parking ait été payant. Le prix est plus que symbolique et c'est donc un peu ridicule de faire payer.

reviews.title: Optisch top, aber die Service und Speisen/Drink-Qualität lässt bei dem Preis zu wünschen übrig, auch ein Pool oder S
reviews.positives: Die Optik und die Lage
reviews.negatives: Der Service im Restaurant und die Qualität von Speisen und Drinks (Cocktails). Außerdem wurde ich im Voraus angeschrieben und nach speziellen Wünschen gefragt. Ich sagte, dass ich Veganerin bin und fragte nach Hafermilch beim Frühstrück. Sie versicherten mir dass dies vorhanden sei und man sich gut um meine Essgewohnheiten kümmern würde. Am Ende saßen wir beschämt im Restaurant, wurden behandelt als wollten wir eine bodenlose Extrawurst (nach der sie mich ja gefragt hatten) und es gab natürlich keine Hafermilch. War für alle Beteiligten maximal ungünstig und auch nachdem ich dem Hotel geschrieben habe, kam leider keine Rückmeldung oder Erklärung dafür. Daher war es leider mein letzter Besuch.

reviews.title: Mooi, nieuw hotel met prachtig uitzicht en goede voorzieningen op locatie in centrum.
reviews.positives: Heel mooi hotel met fantastische kamers. Die van mij keek uit over Lions Head en Signal Hill, fantastisch; en de kamers zijn ruim, logisch en van alle gemakken voorzien. Ontbijt was prima, maar niet uitzonderlijk wat ik misschien wel verwacht had. Locatie is midden in de stad. Restaurant bij het hotel is prijzig, maar fantastisch van niveau. Heerlijke wijn en prima eten.
reviews.negatives: Zit meestal dicjt bij het waterfront en dat biedt toch meer keuzes qua eten en drinken en is gemakkelijker als je wil rondreizen in de stad. Sommige personeelsleden moeten nog een lesje klantvriendelijkheid krijgen, maar dat waren wel de uitzonderingen

reviews.title: Geweldig
reviews.positives: Personeel was uitermate vriendelijk en behulpzaam. Niets dan lof! We kwamen aan nadat de bar al was gesloten. We wilden nog graag een wijn drinken. Aankomst in CapeTown moet je natuurlijk even vieren. We hadden natuurlijk alle begrip dat de bar op een bepaalde tijd sluit. We vroegen naar de mogelijkheden. Een van de portiers stelde voor om mee te lopen om te kijken of er in de buurt nog een fles wijn te krijgen was. Dat ook lukte. Prima ontbijt, ruime keuze van de kaart alsook buffet. Dat gebakken eitje was precies zoals we het vroegen. Crispy on the side.prima bedden en kamer. Mooi interieur. Dit hotel gaat heel populair worden.

Также столкнулись с ситуацией, что при висящей табличке «не беспокоить» входят в номер без стука (видимо воровать как раз), заметив, что в номере люди - убегают

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: Проживание было идеальным! Очень стильный отель. Номера комфортные, большие. Удобные кровати, отличная косметика. Вкусный завтрак! Ну а персонал выше всяких похвал!!! Очень отзывчивые и заботливые! Большое спасибо за прекрасные дни. Обязательно вернемся снова.

reviews.title: Exceptional

В отеле есть подземный паркинг, очень удобно если на машине
Супер удобная кровать и прекрасный матрас - спалось как дома

reviews.title: При заселении в отельиз из за  сбоя в программе  нам не смогтли предоставить  номер выбранной  категории, но в результат
reviews.positives: Замечательный отель с  удобным расположением и очень отзывчивым персоналом.  Отель новый и чистый, в безопасном районе , рядом торговый центр с аптекой, супермаркетами и кафе.
reviews.negatives: Окна открываются не во всех номерах, заранее уточняйте это при бронировании

reviews.title: Отличный выбор для отеля в Кейптауне
reviews.positives:
Понравилось расположение, близко ко всем достопримечательностям, безопасно. 
Интересный дизайн отеля, все новое, очень стильно оформлены интерьеры. Большой комфортный номер на 4-ых, удобные кровати. Превосходные завтраки!  Выбирали между другими отелями в Camps bay, Waterfront, sea point, немного сомневались на счет расположения. В итоге нам очень понравилось здесь жить, с удовольствием вернемся снова.

reviews.negatives: Room was very noisy from outside noise with generator running. When i introduced this with reception they did not care, were quite rude

reviews.title: I wont be back
reviews.positives: Breakfast was good
reviews.negatives: No help to get to my room upon arrival. I get there and cannot open the door so go back to reception then someone comes up with me only to show me that I have basically kick the door to get it open as the doors are stuck. Seriously not what I expect from a hotel at this high cost. Dinner was so expensive, I paid for including dinner while what was added barely got you anything on the menu. Dinner menu prices are not in line with pricing of other SA hotels

reviews.title: Horrendous. Refer to management for details.
reviews.positives: Both fine.
reviews.negatives: Booked 2 queen beds but got only one, despite confirming 24 hours earlier. Inexcusable as traveling with my carer as a TREAT for her. She insisted on sleeping on the sofa. Embarrassing and disappointing.

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.positives: I didn't bother to have the breakfast even though i paid.
reviews.negatives: My money got missing in the room, the cleaner stole the money and purposely locked the safe. They didn't provide the cleaner to open the safe because they know we would question her about the missing funds. They had to open the safe with a HACK

reviews.title: It turned out to be a good experience,the manager handled our concerns in a very professional manner
reviews.positives: The location was excellent, and some of the staff were very welcoming and professional. Natasha, in particular, was my children’s favorite. The room cleanliness was impressive, and the bedsheets were perfect.
reviews.negatives:
The breakfast needs significant improvement. The menu was the same every day, and having identical breakfast options became very repetitive. We stayed for 11 nights. We even had to skip breakfast on some days, even though we had paid for it.

Additionally, one of the receptionists was quite unprofessional. When we raised concerns about the family rooms, his response was dismissive, as if we simply had to accept the situation, even though the room did not match what was advertised on Booking.com. He also stated that they could not verify anything with Booking.com, since it is a third-party provider, implying that any discrepancies were not the hotel’s responsibility.

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives: Facilities are new, location is superb.
reviews.negatives: Staff need training, and to increase attentativness.

reviews.title: Good
reviews.positives: It’s a new hotel ,very nice building and decoration in a very convenient location with many restaurants and bars around. Large rooms with nice amenities
reviews.negatives:
The staff could be more friendly. 
Our first day in the Hotel when we arrived was really awkward and disappointed as the agent at the front desk was very snob and not friendly at all. Didn’t welcome us, didn’t smile at all, just made the necessary procedure and gave us the key card, not even some details about the hotel, the services, the breakfast, the wifi. 
Also, the staff at the restaurant was unexperienced, many mistakes, couldnt handle the breakfast and the service was poor.

reviews.title: Improve of breakfast need more selection for.kids as well
reviews.positives: Comfort and bathroom was amazing
reviews.negatives: Breakfast was not good

reviews.positives: Staff was really friendly and helpful. Food was delicious. Health club is good.bed was comfortable.
reviews.negatives: Washroom doesn’t have any lock.just a sliding door only.so it is really not comfortable especially when you stay with kids.

reviews.title: Great location to explore Capetown
reviews.positives: Location, free drinking water, views.
reviews.negatives: Sliding door on bathroom, something in room that made me cough (perhaps the newness of materials or something), getting woken up by faulty fire alarm at midnight.

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives: Perfect location and amazing breakfast.
reviews.negatives: Rooms are quite small for the price.

reviews.title: Wonderful stay.
reviews.positives:
The Hotel & Staff were lovely! The location was good. 
The room & bathroom amenities were excellent.
reviews.negatives:
The breakfast options and halal options could be better.
There’s no pool.

reviews.title: Wonderful hotel in great location
reviews.positives: Great and safe location surrounded by nice and trendy cafes, restaurants, supermarket, chemist etc. Fairly easy 1km stroll (or Uber) into the CBD. Rooms were really comfortable. Hotel buffet breakfast was excellent
reviews.negatives: The A/C in my room didn’t work for two days. The first service person who came declared that it was fine, but the second person who came (after I complained again) immediately noticed that it wasn’t working properly and arranged repair. The staff just need a bit more prompting that I’m used to in order to get what you need

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.negatives: No hot water the morning of departure

reviews.title: Hotel with attention to detail
reviews.positives: With several restaurants and bars in the same city block, no need to drive to the dreaded waterfront to get a meal. I also really like the court yard, open air space without leaving the perimeter of the hotel. Staff were not just friendly and effective, but seem really trained
reviews.negatives: The central aircon in the room is loud, even in the lowest fan setting. And no way of not using it, as the windows don't open

reviews.title: Very enjoyable
reviews.positives: Breakfast very good. A good selection on offer  every day
reviews.negatives: Nilvery enjoyable

reviews.title: Memorable Anniversary Trip :)
reviews.positives:
The staff were amazingly helpful and happily stored our luggage after check out as we had a late flight. Hotel decor was lovely and rooms had modern amenities & good WiFi :) 
Location was perfect for us, easy distance to most things and not too busy or loud despite being so close to Kloof Street.
It was a trip for our wedding anniversary and we were so grateful for the extra touches they added to make it special for us.
reviews.negatives: After 10pm there were no options for room service for food or drinks, the bar was closed and no vending machines in the hotel. This was a little annoying as we often came back from trips late and had to walk to a shop to get a drink, which late at night didn't feel very safe.

reviews.title: Highly recommended
reviews.positives: Beautiful hotel with nice, big, very clean rooms. The staff was super friendly and the location is great. The breakfast buffet was outstanding!

reviews.title: Love this hotel and its surroundings
reviews.positives:
This is our third stay at Canopy By Hilton.
It's in a fantastic location, close to everywhere and yet is extremely quiet and cocooning.
Stylish classy hotel with beautiful interior design.
reviews.negatives: Although there is a really great gym at the hotel, a spa would really finish it off.

reviews.title: Worth it
reviews.positives: Beautiful hotel, nice decoration and atmosphere. Nice staff.
reviews.negatives: Quite a big hotel, many corridors with carpets on floor. Of course carpets reduce noises coming from corridors, but carpets are hard to keep clean and don’t smell good. It generates also waste difficult to recycle. I would prefer wood floor.

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.positives: Location
reviews.negatives: N/A

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.positives: The location
reviews.negatives: Nothing

reviews.title: Lovely hotel and in a great and vibrant location.
reviews.positives: Location was brilliant! All the staff were very helpful and supportive. We were travelling as a young family with 3 year old and 11 month old. Parking was great and secure. The rooms were very clean and spacious with a view of table mountain!
reviews.negatives: There could be more tables for breakfast and dinner. Felt there wasn’t enough seating for the number of guests.

reviews.title: Worth repeating and truly enjoyable!!
reviews.positives: The hotel was vibey, super efficient and friendly staff and amazing rooms! Ongetem- the in house restaurant is fabulous!! The hotel is also conveniently located around shops and restaurants! Great experience overall!!

reviews.title: Comfortable city stay, with everything nearby.
reviews.positives: We really enjoyed our stay at the Canopy. The breakfast and coffee were great. The location of the hotel was perfect as well. We had a car for the duration of our trip all the attractions felt nearby. We were easily able to visit the Waterfront, the Lion's Head and even Camp's bay. There were also great dining options right around the hotel.
reviews.negatives: I understand it was holiday season, but I wish the nightly rates were bit more reasonable. Nothing else comes to mind. It was a very comfortable stay.

reviews.title: Highly recommended 👍
reviews.positives: Stylish and modern, lots of cool cafes and restaurants around
reviews.negatives: Nothing

reviews.title: Short and Sweet
reviews.positives: Breakfast, spacious room and location. Staff are very friendly.
reviews.negatives: That they don't have a pool

reviews.title: Fantastic!
reviews.positives: Lovely hotel. Great attention to detail and exceptional effort from the staff.

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.positives: Easy, comfortable and what we needed.

reviews.title: Super staff, great location
reviews.positives: Super friendly staff, they tried to accommodate all requests to have a relaxed and carefree stay. Good and safe indoor parking available. Spacious rooms with nice, comfortable beds. The hotel is new, which is very nice. The location is superb within Gardens, and many nice restaurants are at walking distance. Nice views on Table Mountain.
reviews.negatives: Service at breakfast was a little chaotic sometimes. Flavors and dishes were very good though.

reviews.title: We had a wonderful time!
reviews.positives: I loved the room design, the cleanliness and the location of this hotel. Wonderful!*****

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.positives: Excellent location. Friendly and attentive staff. Decent gymn. Clean rooms and comfy with good lighting. Free still and sparkling water from dispensers next to the room.
reviews.negatives:
First room we were given had a small electrical fault that caused lights to trip off but room was changed as soon as we alerted front desk.
Bathrooms a bit too small for two people.

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.negatives: The morning shift at the reception . I don't want to mention her name . She doesn't like to help or to sort  out misunderstandings.  Luckily, her manager worked it out .

reviews.title: Amazing hotel at a great location, amazing breakfast.
reviews.positives: Location, Breakfast was amazing so much choices. Friendly staff. Nice modern hotel.

reviews.title: Central fun and well worth a stay
reviews.positives: Fabulous
reviews.negatives: Nothing

reviews.title: Wonderful stay
reviews.positives: Everything was great during our stay at the Canopy. Location is ideal, it is a new and modern hotel, very clean, spacious rooms and the breakfast is excellent. The staff goes above and beyond, we really enjoyed our stay. We had a misunderstanding while booking a tour, the staff quickly solved it and we had an excellent guide from Ax Explorer (Owen). Do not hesitate to book this hotel and ask for the guide, it will certainly be a great time!
reviews.negatives: Nothing, everything was good.

reviews.title: Wonderful!
reviews.positives: Very clean,modern,friendly staff and amazing location!
reviews.negatives: Nothing we did not like.

reviews.title: The front fest was very professional. Room very neat. Great food at the restaurant
reviews.positives: Great location. Neat & very spacious.
reviews.negatives: Nothing

reviews.title: Really good hotel and area for Cape Town visitors
reviews.positives:
Great building. Modern but in keeping with heritage designs. 

Management are also great. They needed to move us for a perfectly reasonable reason. The manager went way beyond to make sure we were okay with it, and got my kids a great fruit bowl.

10/10 servicd

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives:
We had a five star stay at a four star hotel! Rooms were very nice, spacious and equipped with a very comfortable bed. Staff was so nice everywhere im the hotel. The breakfast was so good that we cancelled all our breakfast reservations at other restaurants because we had everything we needed right at the hotel.

The location was also a great starting point to explore Cape Town. Lots of nice and hip cafes and restaurants even in walking distance or directly attached to the hotel. Also, the area felt very safe.
reviews.negatives: Nothing. Everything was just perfect!

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives:
Location 
Staff
Breakfast 
Views 
Terrace 
Gym

reviews.title: perfect stay
reviews.positives: A brand new, nice hotel that has everything you need. I mostly enjoyed the big and full equipped Gym. Breakfast was fabulous. big, quiet and clean rooms. everything top.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: The customer service, environment, food basically everything

reviews.title: Cape Town splendid at the Canopy
reviews.positives: Originally booked for 1 night but ended up staying 2 weeks enjoyed it so much. Breakfast was delicious and lots of variety, location to kloof street restaurants and shops ideal and easy access to waterfront. Gym was top notch for cardio and stretching. Staff were wonderful and friendly! Internet also excellent with comfy beds and a first class shower!
reviews.negatives: The pillows were a bit soft for our liking but we are nitpicking as everything was great!

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: Everything , the place met and exceeded my expectations

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: Great location in a very safe area of Cape Town!!! The rooms were very clean, and the staff were incredibly friendly and helpful. We had a perfect stay and would definitely choose this hotel again.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: Super nice area. Very beautiful and stylish hotel. Nice breakfasts. Everything is cool and with a taste
reviews.negatives: I would add vegetables to the breakfast and it’s the only thing I can add

reviews.title: More than we expected !!!
reviews.positives: Perfet location. Love restaurant ONGETEM
reviews.negatives: Nothing

reviews.title: Absolutely recommend to everyone!
reviews.positives: The breakfast was one of the best I had in the world! Absolutely stunning. The staff is super kind, the room was really clean and the location was perfect.
reviews.negatives: On check-out day, check-out is at 11am so I did not like someone knocking on my door at 9am to ask me through the door what time I was checking out.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: Loved the hotel, beautiful decor, comfortable stay and good location
reviews.negatives: Can be a little pricey - best to stay out of season.

reviews.title: Great location. Wonderful aesthetics. Brilliant food. I'll definitely be back.
reviews.positives: There is so much to like about this hotel: great aesthetic, cleanliness, professionalism of the staff, great food from the restaurant and brilliant location to get around the City. I highly recommend, you won't be disappointed.
reviews.negatives: A microwave in the room would have been great, and honestly, that isn't even a big thing. There's nothing to dislike in truth.

reviews.title: Excellent stay. Very new and clean. Great touches and decoration throughout.
reviews.positives: Very new, clean property.
reviews.negatives: There could be more space for guests wanting a drink in the evening as all the space is taken up for the restaurant.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: It’s safe area , nice and clean , stuff was amazing, always help in and kind , especially on reception guys . So definitely I recommend this hotel .

reviews.title: Super comfortable and friendly
reviews.positives: The rooms were spacious and the location was perfect. Close to restaurants

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives:
Location 
Hygiene 
Staff

reviews.title: The perfect staycation reset for parents that getting away from their kids
reviews.positives: Excellent central location in the heart of vibrant kloof street. Incredible thoughtful design and architecture.  Friendly and accommodating staff assisting with late check out.
reviews.negatives: Really can’t fault this brand new hotel that will do excellently for the upcoming summer season

reviews.title: Amazing Hotel with Great Staff!
reviews.positives: The location & Great Staff! Especially the Sommelier  Lungi. She has a great knowledge of all the wines in South-Africa. Zolani the waiter, such a wonderful supportive person. And the Exec Chef Bradley, we have had dinner 3x times and they where above expectations!!

reviews.title: Superb and sophisticated city hotel
reviews.positives: Superb finishings and decor, well designed rooms, excellent service

reviews.title: Nothing short of amazing!
reviews.positives: I’m really impressed with the professionalism and servitude of the entire staff from the securities who welcomed us well and helped with our luggage , front desk staff who helped us with seamless check in and the cleaning staff! Everyone is super friendly and always ready to help.

reviews.title: A gem in Longkloof
reviews.positives: Such helpful and friendly people. Big comfortable bed with big pillows and mini fridge and coffee maker. The room was serviced daily and a restaurant was housed within the hotel serving all meals. Great location in a vibrant neighbourhood with restaurants and shops nearby. V&A was approximately 10 minutes by car and Camps Bay 20 minutes. Had a view of table Mountain from my bedroom window.
reviews.negatives: Nothing comes to mind and I enjoyed my stay.

reviews.title: Relaxing , beautiful , serene and convenience
reviews.positives: Hotel is righ in centralized busy area but you cannot tell, all serene , peaceful,  very chic, sophisticated and oh my my word comfort in rooms to die for
reviews.negatives: Maybe if. They put microwave and few crockery in rooms,,, And change that steam iron to real irons iplease.  f can..otherwise all good

reviews.title: Beautiful and clean hotel
reviews.positives: The hotel is so beautiful and clean. The food and service were amazing. It is also kids friendly.

reviews.title: I’ll be back!
reviews.positives: Location. Interior design. Views. Ambience. Staff. Spacious and well laid out rooms.  Tranquility. Bathroom has decent amount of amenities and robes and slippers. Shower has good pressure. Basement parking. Great breakfast and restaurant opens up to a quiet, spacious and open terrace.
reviews.negatives:
No access to YouTube, Netflix, Showmax i.e. Smart TV (maybe yet) 
Waiting for a liquor licence but lots of restaurants and bars around. Less than a 5 min walk.

reviews.title: Perfect stay - great location, comfy bed, and amazing staff!
reviews.positives: Excellent stay! Brand new hotel in a great location, spotless everywhere. The staff were very helpful and the bed was super comfy. Highly recommended.
reviews.negatives: There was absolutely nothing I didn’t like.

reviews.title: Experiência Premmum
reviews.positives:
Hotel novo, 
Linda decoração,
reviews.negatives:

Foi excelente.

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.positives: Quartos amplos e limpos

reviews.title: se eu for novamente a cape town, esse será meu hotel!!
reviews.positives: Localização excelente!
reviews.negatives: Gostei de tudo!!!

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: Localização boa. Quarto confortável e silencioso. Hotel novo.

reviews.title: Espetacular e além das minhas expectativas e de meus parceiros de viagem.
reviews.positives: O café da manhã estava maravilhoso, variado e delicioso. A localização do hotel foi sensacional, bem como as acomodações individuais e coletivas de muito bom gosto. Voltarei novamente e recomendarei para quem perguntar.

reviews.title: Perfeito!
reviews.positives: Hotel muito bonito Quartos ótimos e amplos Perfeito!  Um dos melhores Hotéis que já me hospedei
